data.body:
=== FINAL HANDOFF — op-cert epic 6d0d-7580-e18f-48c3 (sonic-columned-sturgeon) ===
RUN: /rebar-implement. Worktree /Users/joeoakhart/rebar-opcert branch epic/opcert-sonic (rebased onto current origin/main). Gerrit stack (relation chain): 649<-650<-660<-664.

DELIVERED — 3 children CLOSED + fully GREEN (Verified+1 AND LLM-Review+1; completion-verifier signed):
 - 368c garlicky-deviant-kakapo -> change 649. rebar.opcert.v1 asymmetric kind (src/rebar/attest/opcert.py): DSSE+SSHSIG/Ed25519, in-toto subject binds {ticket_id, material_fingerprint, merged_log_commit, KIND}, explicit-SHA era validity, two-phase verdict.
 - 42d1 urban-dihydric-trogon -> change 650. .rebar/trusted_environments.yaml loader + verify_required_environment (verify vs PINNED key) + verify.require_environment/opcert_enforce_since config (src/rebar/attest/trusted_env.py).
 - e4df behavioral-winsome-blacklemur -> change 660. Storage keystone (owner-approved Option A): sign_opcert_manifest producer + reducer present-only fold + opcert_from_record; extends SIGNATURE record (git-gpgsig style).
 All under held-out TDD + mutation checks. THREE real security findings caught+fixed en route: era-revoke, fail-open compacted-anchor, kind-confusion.

ESCALATED to a stronger model (brief + addendum in the conversation transcript) — the authoritative-state / key-rotation design:
 - 4214 unfair-mindless-halcyon -> change 664 (BLOCKED). verify-opcert merge-gate implemented; material-half authoritative-input fix LANDED (recompute material + gated-history commit). ERA-ANCHOR finding OPEN + escalated (owner: do not decide now): era key-validity checked at cert's self-chosen merged_log_commit -> revoked key can bind pre-revocation commit. Fork A (era-at-HEAD) vs B (independent anchor, needs produce side).
 - ee0b imminent-reformable-fruitbat (OPEN, unbuilt). Trusted rebar-mcp server + AWS IaC. Plan did NOT converge over 5 review rounds (integration of gate_dispatch/HMAC-self-signing/verdict-vocab/Lambda-timeout/Secrets-Manager). AWS deploy IS in scope (authenticated CLI available).
 - 8f1d educatory-astrakhan-wallaroo (OPEN, unbuilt). HMAC removal; blocked on the producer-key seam decision (local gates: sign op-certs with a local env key vs only the trusted server signs) — coupled to ee0b.
 - 6a89 promethean-sentient-rockrat (OPEN, unbuilt). Docs/ADR — write once the model settles (xref ADR 0046).

NEXT: submit 649/650/660 (sound, independent of era-anchor) at owner discretion; stronger model resolves ee0b/8f1d/4214-era-anchor holistically; then 6a89 docs. Prior handoff log: woodblock-condensed-racerunner 87fc-b9d0-ce8a-4838.
